title: The Birthday Gift
content: Ella wanted to find the perfect birthday gift for her brother. After work, she visited several small shops downtown. She looked at books, watches, and music albums, but nothing felt right. Then she entered a sports store and saw a soccer jersey from his favorite team. Ella smiled immediately because she knew he would love it. The employee wrapped the gift in colorful paper before she left. On the bus ride home, Ella felt excited to see her brother’s reaction at the birthday dinner tomorrow night.
